violations.text: The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - retail shelves - curbside coolers/freezer (COS) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026

The floors under the produce shelves have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026

The door to the outside, located in the (storage room area ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator C and 2 Dr reach in(interior) and produce open case cooler vents(base) have an accumulation food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

The floors in the meat and freezer walk ins, under produce displays, and back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
